response.body:
{
  "id": "{{request.pathSegments.[1]}}",
  "date": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.date'}}",
  "time": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.time'}}",
  "description": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.description'}}",
  "status": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.status'}}",

  "courtCode": "{{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.courtCode')}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.courtCode'}}{{else}}{{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.courtLocationCode')}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.courtLocationCode'}}{{else}}MCJC072{{/if}}{{/if}}",
  "courtName": "{{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.courtName')}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.courtName'}}{{else}}Manchester Civil Justice Centre Set 8{{/if}}",
  "cjaCode": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.cjaCode')}}"{{jsonPath request.body '$.cjaCode'}}"{{else}}null{{/if}},
  "otherLocationDescription": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.otherLocationDescription')}}"{{jsonPath request.body '$.otherLocationDescription'}}"{{else}}null{{/if}},

  "durationHours": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.durationHours')}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.durationHours'}}{{else}}6{{/if}},
  "durationMinutes": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.durationMinutes')}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.durationMinutes'}}{{else}}3{{/if}},

  "version": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.version')}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.version'}}{{else}}1{{/if}},
  "entriesCount": 1,
  "entriesSummary": [
    {
      "uuid": "{{randomValue type='UUID'}}",
      "sequenceNumber": 1,
      "accountNumber": "ACC000146",
      "applicant": null,
      "respondent": "Legal Aid Board",
      "postCode": "BA15 1LA",
      "applicationTitle": "Appeal to Crown Court",
      "feeRequired": false,
      "result": null
    }
  ]
}
